facility: Johns Hopkins Bayview Pulmonary / Infectious Disease Clinic
indication: Evaluation of positive PPD (14 mm) in a Vietnamese-born adult; rule out active pulmonary tuberculosis.
technique: PA and lateral views of the chest with adequate inspiration and penetration.
findings: Lungs are clear bilaterally. No focal consolidation, mass, or pleural effusion. No cavitary lesions. No upper-lobe scarring. No miliary pattern. Cardiomediastinal silhouette within normal limits. Hila are without lymphadenopathy. No nodules visualized at this resolution. Bony thorax is unremarkable.
impression:
1. NO RADIOGRAPHIC EVIDENCE OF ACTIVE OR HEALED PULMONARY TUBERCULOSIS.
2. No nodules, masses, or focal infiltrates identified.
3. No acute cardiopulmonary process.
